phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa un lettino, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOS-tah oon let-TEE-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è posto per oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh POS-toh per OJ-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si trovano i bagni, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see TROH-vah-noh ee BAH-nyee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the beach.

responses.english: At the end of the beach.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, qual è la procedura per noleggiare una barca?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh kwahl EH lah proh-cheh-DOO-rah pehr noh-lehj-JAH-reh OO-nah BAR-kah

likely_response.local: Vada al chiosco sulla sabbia e compili il modulo.
likely_response.pronunciation: VAH-dah AHL kee-OH-skoh SOOL-lah sahb-BEE-ah EH kohm-PEE-lee EEL moh-DOO-loh
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the kiosk on the sand and fill out the form.

responses.english: Go to the kiosk on the sand and fill out the form.
responses.phonetic: VAH-dah AHL kee-OH-skoh SOOL-lah sahb-BEE-ah EH kohm-PEE-lee EEL moh-DOO-loh
responses.french: Vada al chiosco sulla sabbia e compili il modulo.
